Bash(# Check ALL upcoming fixtures - maybe odds are on a different fixture
# Also try a wider time range and see what status=1 \(live\) fixtures exist
curl -s "https://api.oddspapi.io/v4/fixtures?sportId=16&bookmakers=1xbet&from=2026-03-08T00:00:00Z&to=2026-03-10T00:00:00Z&apiKey=0e758def-6dae-478c-aacc-4bf3d26e06d1" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for f in data:
    print\(f'{f[\\"fixtureId\\"]} status={f[\\"statusId\\"]} hasOdds={f[\\"hasOdds\\"]} | {f[\\"participant1Name\\"]} vs {f[\\"participant2Name\\"]} | {f[\\"startTime\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(# Get the FixtureOddsResponse schema
cat /Users/sergejromanov/.claude/projects/-Users-sergejromanov-pet-dota-predict/19ef3837-d37b-4b66-8cc8-71a28d871eca/tool-results/webfetch-1772965607415-brkwa0.bin | python3 -c "
import json,sys
spec = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
schemas = spec.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
odds_resp = schemas.get\('FixtureOddsResponse', {}\)
print\(json.dumps\(odds_resp, indent=2\)[:3000]\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Get OddsByBookmaker schema and its nested types
cat /Users/sergejromanov/.claude/projects/-Users-sergejromanov-pet-dota-predict/19ef3837-d37b-4b66-8cc8-71a28d871eca/tool-results/webfetch-1772965607415-brkwa0.bin | python3 -c "
import json,sys
spec = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
schemas = spec.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
for name in ['OddsByBookmaker', 'BookmakerOdds', 'MarketOdds', 'OutcomeOdds', 'PlayerOdds', 'Fixture']:
    if name in schemas:
        print\(f'\\n=== {name} ==='\)
        print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)[:800]\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Get OddsMap schema
cat /Users/sergejromanov/.claude/projects/-Users-sergejromanov-pet-dota-predict/19ef3837-d37b-4b66-8cc8-71a28d871eca/tool-results/webfetch-1772965607415-brkwa0.bin | python3 -c "
import json,sys
spec = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
schemas = spec.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
for name in ['OddsMap', 'OddsEntry']:
    if name in schemas:
        print\(f'\\n=== {name} ==='\)
        print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)[:1000]\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Get OddQuote schema and all odds-related schemas
cat /Users/sergejromanov/.claude/projects/-Users-sergejromanov-pet-dota-predict/19ef3837-d37b-4b66-8cc8-71a28d871eca/tool-results/webfetch-1772965607415-brkwa0.bin | python3 -c "
import json,sys
spec = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
schemas = spec.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
for name in sorted\(schemas.keys\(\)\):
    if 'odd' in name.lower\(\) or 'quote' in name.lower\(\):
        print\(f'\\n=== {name} ==='\)
        print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)[:600]\)
" 2>/dev/null)
